name: skill-agentic-loop
description: Use when user says "自主循环", "agentic loop", "目标驱动执行", or needs a goal-driven P2↔P3 self-closing loop that retries failed checklist items autonomously until achieved/diverged/timeout, then returns to P1 human-checkpoint or proceeds to P4. Loop is decision layer; Act is delegated to agent-dispatcher via Agent Teams (subagents) — loop never writes code itself.
